text.title: graph-rag-retrieval Output Contract
text.summary: JSON schema for one retrieval invocation result. The subagent must return query_type, retrieval_path, candidates[], assembled_context, and fallback_used flag. Includes one valid and one invalid example.

example.note: Valid: query classified as RELATIONSHIP, path traversal used, candidates carry chunk_id + source, fallback not needed.
Invalid: missing query_type, retrieval_path, fallback_used; candidates are bare strings rather than typed objects.

list.item: `query_type` is one of the four canonical enums.
`retrieval_path` corresponds to the type via r2-r4 (GLOBAL→summary, RELATIONSHIP→shortest-path, ENTITY→entity-neighbors or hybrid, LOCAL→vector-search).
Every candidate has chunk_id + score + source.
`fallback_used=true` only when the primary path returned zero candidates.

text.reference: Validates a result JSON file against this schema.
